steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage begins by referencing "Steve Carter’s award-winning play Eden" and its 1976 production, then shifts to discuss the Negro Ensemble Company (NEC), its founders, and its role in supporting Black playwrights. The decisive signal is the shift from a specific play to the underlying theater company responsible for its production.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice C aligns because it describes a structure that "refers to the production of a play and examines the theater company responsible." A and D incorrectly reference obstacles (not discussed) and two plays (text mentions only one play). B falsely claims a comparison of plays. That matches choice C — C is correct.
